== Notes for [[Item:Q112141|Q112141]] ==

Fernando Ansúrez, V Conde

Immediate Family:

Son of Asur Fernández and Gontroda Núñez

Husband of Nuña (Muniadona) Domna Fernández

Father of Assura Fernández

Brother of Mayor González, Muniz; Oveco Ansúrez;Munio Ansúrez; Gutierre Ansúrez; Gonzalo Ansúrezand 1 other

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
